title: Clean up the Conditional GO execution plan after all remediation
rawUserRequest: 继续实施 2026-07-22 Conditional GO Review Remediation 全部计划，严格按顺序完成每个工单的 Contract、验证、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步；最后完成清理执行计划文档。用户已授权完整计划实施。

declaredIntent.summary: 审计所有计划与引用，标记本计划为历史保留，删除仅有重复且无引用的副本，保留所有 Work Item Contract、Summary、评审、发布与关闭证据。

outOfScope: Deletion of Contracts, Summaries, review materials, release evidence, or referenced documents.

sources.reason: Required lifecycle closure and immutable evidence rules.
Authoritative archive mapping and history preservation.

riskAssessment.reason: Deletion is bounded by link scans and immutable evidence preservation; no runtime behavior changes.

executionDecision.reason: WI10 is closed and default main is synchronized; user authorization covers final plan cleanup.

preReviewWarnings: Review every deletion against link/reference scans and confirm all immutable lifecycle evidence remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All plans are classified as current, completed-audit, superseded, or safe-to-delete with evidence.
The Conditional GO plan is marked historical and links each Work Item to PR, merge SHA, archive, and closure evidence.
Only unreferenced duplicate plan copies are deleted; protected evidence remains.
Link, duplicate, status, and cleanup regression scans pass.
guidelines: Preserve immutable Work Item, release, review, and closure evidence.
Do not delete a referenced document or an authoritative archive record.
Record every deletion decision and its scan evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Referenced plans and all Work Item evidence are preserved.
Only unreferenced duplicate plan copies are deleted after link and status scans.

intent.problem: The repository contains historical execution-plan copies whose current/superseded status and references must be made explicit after all eleven planned Work Items.
constraints: Do not delete immutable Contract, Summary, PR, release, review, or closure evidence.
Do not publish the final release in this cleanup Work Item.
intent.rationale: A final evidence-backed cleanup prevents stale plans from misleading future collaborators while preserving complete audit history.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
